title: CallsLink component with hover popover and file navigation
purpose: Provides a clickable orange link that shows a popover with file content on hover, and navigates to the referenced file on click.
module_context: Exports a default component CallsLink that accepts name, fileStem, project, and onNavigate props. Defines HOVER_DELAY and GRACE_PERIOD constants for popover timing behavior.

methods.name: CallsLink
methods.normalized_params: ({ name, fileStem, project, onNavigate }: CallsLinkProps): JSX.Element

steps.content: Initialize popover state with visibility set to false.
Create refs for anchor element, hover timer, and grace timer.
Define callbacks to clear hover and grace timers.
Define handler for mouse enter that schedules popover display after delay.
Define handler for mouse leave that schedules popover hide after grace period.
Define handler for click that navigates to the referenced file.
Define handler for popover mouse enter that cancels grace timer.
Define handler for popover mouse leave that schedules popover hide after grace period.
Clear the hover timer if it is active.
Set the hover timer reference to null.
Clear the grace timer if it is active.
Set the grace timer reference to null.
Clear the grace timer if it is active.
Schedule a timer to show the popover after the hover delay.
IF the anchor element exists, get its bounding rectangle.
Fetch the file data from the pseudo API for the referenced file.
IF the fetch succeeds, store the file data in popover state.
IF the fetch fails, show the popover without file data.
Update popover state to show the popover with anchor rectangle and file data.
Clear the hover timer if it is active.
Schedule a timer to hide the popover after the grace period.
Clear the hover timer if it is active.
Clear the grace timer if it is active.
Navigate to the referenced file using the provided navigation handler.
Clear the grace timer if it is active.
Schedule a timer to hide the popover after the grace period.
